---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a scoped improvement that fits the active roadmap
title: "feature: "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: ["szTheory"]
---

## Problem

What user or maintainer problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change

What should Rulestead do instead?

## Why now

Explain why this belongs in the current or near-future roadmap instead of a later phase.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you evaluate?

## Additional context

Link relevant roadmap items, prior art, or examples.
